zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy於1069年出生時，他的父親Sir William de Percy Sr36歲，母親Emma de Port31歲。他於1087年與Emma de Gaunt在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1135年12月15日在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年66歲，埋葬在英國越可爾惠特比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy于1069年出生时，他的父亲Sir William de Percy Sr36岁，母亲Emma de Port31岁。他于1087年与Emma de Gaunt在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1135年12月15日在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年66岁，埋葬在英国越可爾惠特比。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy was born in 1069, his father, Sir William de Percy Sr, was 36 and his mother, Emma de Port, was 31. He married Emma de Gaunt in 1087, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 December 1135, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 66, and was buried in Whitby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy est né en 1069, son père, Sir William de Percy Sr, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma de Port, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Gaunt en 1087, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1135, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy 1069 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Percy Sr 36 und seine Mutter Emma de Port 31. Er hat 1087 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England Emma de Gaunt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1135 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel und wurde in Whitby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy è nato il nel 1069, il suo padre, Sir William de Percy Sr, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Port, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Gaunt nel 1087, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 dicembre 1135, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Whitby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percyが1069年に生まれた時，父Sir William de Percy Srは36歳，母Emma de Portは31歳であった。1087年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでEmma de Gauntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1135年12月15日にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで66歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy(이)가 1069년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Percy Sr(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Port(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1087년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Emma de Gaunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1135년 12월 15일 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 휘트비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy nasceu em 1069, seu pai, Sir William de Percy Sr, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Port, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Gaunt em 1087, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1135, em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy родился в 1069 г., его отцу по имени Sir William de Percy Sr было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Port, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Gaunt в 1087 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 декабря 1135 г. в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy nació en 1069, su papá, Sir William de Percy Sr, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Emma de Port, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Emma de Gaunt en 1087, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1135, en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
